language.label: Language
language.preferenceDescription: Choose the language used across the gallery and dashboard.

footer.description: Your destination for exquisite floral arrangements and curated gifts. Discover elegance in every bouquet, crafted with love and artistry for life's most beautiful moments.

homePage.subtitle: Discover exquisite floral arrangements, curated bouquets, and luxury gift sets — each one crafted with love, artistry, and the finest blooms for life's most beautiful moments.
homePage.premiumServicesSubtitle: Every detail is curated to make your moments unforgettable
homePage.serviceArtisanDesc: Each arrangement is handcrafted by our expert florists with meticulous attention to detail.
homePage.serviceFreshDesc: We source the finest flowers daily to ensure every bouquet radiates freshness and beauty.
homePage.serviceGiftDesc: Luxurious presentation with premium wrapping, ribbons, and a personalized card.
homePage.serviceDeliveryDesc: Order before noon and receive your beautiful arrangement the very same day.
homePage.occasionsSubtitle: Find the perfect arrangement for life's precious moments

productsPage.title: Our Collections
productsPage.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filter to find the perfect bouquet.

productDetail.notFoundDescription: The arrangement you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

reviews.title: Ratings & Reviews
reviews.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience with this arrangement...
reviews.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience!
reviews.loginToReview: Sign in to write a review
reviews.purchaseRequired: You can review this item only after purchasing it.

cartPage.title: Your Cart
cartPage.emptyDescription: Discover our beautiful collections and add something special.

ordersPage.title: My Orders
ordersPage.emptyDescription: Place an order and it will appear here.

profilePage.title: My Profile
profilePage.languageHelp: Switch between Arabic and English from here instead of the main navigation.

auth.accountCreated: Account created. Please check your inbox and verify your email before placing orders.
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll help you get back in
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkInbox: We sent a reset link to:
forgotPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is no longer valid. It may have expired or already been used.
resetPassword.expiredCode: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.invalidCode: This reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.

verifyEmailPage.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmailPage.subtitle: One more step to get started
verifyEmailPage.sentTo: We sent a verification email to:
verifyEmailPage.instructions: Please check your inbox and spam folder, then click the verification link. You must verify your email before you can add items to cart or place orders.

customer.verifyBanner: Please verify your email to unlock cart and checkout.

admin.noProductsDescription: Add your first floral arrangement to get started.
admin.arabicNamePlaceholder: Name shown when Arabic is selected
admin.arabicDescriptionPlaceholder: Description shown when Arabic is selected
admin.googleDriveHelper: Google Drive share links are automatically converted to direct image links.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.strongPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long, include an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
validation.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
validation.fillShippingDetails: Please fill in all delivery details.
validation.discountExceedsPrice: Discount price must be less than the original price.
validation.imageRequired: At least one image is required.
validation.invalidImageUrl: One or more image URLs are invalid.
validation.stockInteger: Stock must be a whole number.
validation.accountBlockedContact: Your account is blocked. Please contact support.

toast.waitForUpload: Please wait for image upload to finish.
toast.pleaseLoginToAdd: Please sign in to add items to cart.
toast.verifyBeforeCart: Please verify your email before adding items to cart.
toast.verifyBeforeOrders: Please verify your email before placing orders.
toast.verifyCartAccess: Please verify your email to access your cart.
toast.verifyOrdersAccess: Please verify your email to access your orders.
toast.verifyCartUpdate: Please verify your email to update your cart.
toast.verifyPlaceOrders: Please verify your email to place orders.
toast.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
toast.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes.
toast.emailVerified: Email verified! Welcome to Nada Gallery.
toast.emailStillNotVerified: Email is still not verified. Please open the verification link first.

firebaseErrors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to perform this action. Please verify your email or contact support.
firebaseErrors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
firebaseErrors.emailAlreadyInUse: An account with this email already exists.
firebaseErrors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
firebaseErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
firebaseErrors.differentCredential: This email is already registered with another sign-in method. Please sign in using your original method.
firebaseErrors.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
firebaseErrors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
